about.tagline: Discover the heart of Africa, an incredible experience
about.aboutText1: Welcome to TourismDRC, your gateway to discovering the beauty, culture, and adventure of the Democratic Republic of Congo.
about.aboutText2: We are dedicated to promoting the DRC as a unique travel destination, showcasing its breathtaking landscapes, rich wildlife, vibrant cultures, and unforgettable experiences. From majestic mountains and stunning rivers to national parks and diverse cities, TourismDRC is here to inspire travellers and provide reliable information for exploring this remarkable country.
about.missionText: Our mission is to promote sustainable tourism in the Democratic Republic of Congo by highlighting its natural wonders, cultural heritage, and local communities while encouraging responsible and ethical travel. We also aim to make travel easier and more accessible for visitors, whether they are traveling for vacation, business, research, or other purposes.
about.offer1_desc: Complete packages including accommodation, transport, activities and assistance
about.offer2_desc: Expert guides and detailed information on all destinations
about.offer3_desc: Discover national parks and wildlife experiences
about.offer4_desc: Cultural immersion and Congolese heritage discovery
about.offer5_desc: Travel tips and safety information for a peaceful stay
about.offer6_desc: Resources tailored for business and leisure travel
about.why1_desc: Authentic and up-to-date information on all our destinations
about.why2: Focus on sustainable and responsible tourism
about.why2_desc: Strong commitment to sustainable and responsible tourism
about.why3: Helpful resources to simplify trip planning
about.why3_desc: Practical resources to facilitate your trip planning
about.why4: Passion for showcasing Congo's hidden gems
about.why4_desc: Passion for revealing Congo's hidden treasures
about.visionText: We envision the Democratic Republic of Congo becoming one of Africa's top eco-tourism and business-friendly destinations, where tourism supports conservation, local communities, and economic growth.
about.contactText: Have questions or want to collaborate with us?

home.intro: We are a tourism agency specialized in discovering the DRC. Our mission is to provide you with authentic and secure experiences throughout this country of a thousand wonders.
home.feature1_desc: In-depth knowledge of the terrain and the best destinations
home.feature2_desc: Your safety is our absolute priority, 24/7

home.package3_desc: Discover the rich history and vibrant culture of Kinshasa

about_page.heroSubtitle: Your trusted partner for discovering the beauty of the DRC
about_page.whoWeAreText1: Tourism DRC is a tourism agency specialized in discovering the Democratic Republic of Congo. We are passionate about our country and determined to share its wonders with the world.
about_page.whoWeAreText2: With in-depth local expertise and a network of trusted partners, we create unique travel experiences that combine adventure, culture, and safety.
about_page.value1_desc: To reveal the natural and cultural riches of the DRC through authentic and safe experiences, while contributing to the development of local tourism.
about_page.value2_desc: To become the reference for tourism in the DRC by offering excellent services and promoting responsible and sustainable tourism.
about_page.value3_desc: Authenticity, safety, excellence, respect for the environment and local communities. We believe in tourism that benefits everyone.
about_page.teamText: Our team is made up of passionate professionals, experienced guides and local experts who put their expertise at your service to create unforgettable journeys.
